name: Central Lampang / Robinson / Big C retail core
capture_notes: Primary urban retail node. Good for destination DC charging if parking access and mall dwell time are secured. Public coordinate anchor from Tops Central Lampang listing.

name: Lampang city center / Kad Kong Ta / Wang River
capture_notes: Tourist and old-town activity node. DC hub execution is sensitive to parking and access; better for compact urban or destination charging unless the site has dedicated parking.

name: Highway 1 / Ko Kha - Samakkhi corridor
capture_notes: Highest DOH AADT corridor in Lampang seed data, with Route 1 counts above 50k AADT in 2566 at Ko Kha - Samakkhi. Stronger for travel and intercity stopover demand than pure city demand.

name: Lampang bypass / Route 127
capture_notes: Bypass captures intercity flow around the city. Needs roadside visibility, food/restroom anchor, and easy ingress/egress.

name: Mae Mo industrial / workforce corridor
capture_notes: Industrial and workforce-related demand; public DC demand depends heavily on local EV adoption and fleet behavior.

name: Hang Chat / Chiang Mai-Lampang gateway
capture_notes: Gateway toward Chiang Mai. Useful for corridor screening but needs charger competitor and rest-stop POI verification.
